canonical_filename.mechanism: Fixed filename SKILL.md required inside skill directory

custom_filename.mechanism: Variable directory name: .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md — directory name is the skill identifier

disable_model_invocation.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: disable-model-invocation (optional bool, default false)

display_name.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (optional, falls back to directory name)

shared_scope.mechanism: Managed settings deployment for organization-wide distribution

user_invocable.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: user-invocable (optional bool, default true)

providerExtensions.name: Supporting Files
providerExtensions.summary: Bundle templates, scripts, and reference docs alongside SKILL.md; loaded on demand via ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}.

examples.code: # No YAML field; this is a filesystem convention
examples.note: Supporting files live in the skill directory alongside SKILL.md.

providerExtensions.name: Description-Based Auto-Invocation
providerExtensions.summary: Claude auto-invokes skills whose description matches the conversation; opt out via disable-model-invocation: true.

providerExtensions.name: Argument Hint
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter argument-hint shows expected argument format during autocomplete (purely presentational).

providerExtensions.name: Allowed Tools Pre-Approval
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter allowed-tools pre-approves tool calls while the skill is active (does not restrict availability).

providerExtensions.name: Per-Skill Model Override
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter model overrides the session model while this skill is active.

providerExtensions.name: Per-Skill Effort Level
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter effort overrides the session effort level (low/medium/high/max) while the skill is active.

providerExtensions.name: Subagent Execution via context fork
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter context: fork runs the skill in an isolated subagent with no conversation history; companion agent field selects the subagent type.

providerExtensions.name: Skill-Scoped Lifecycle Hooks
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter hooks attaches lifecycle hooks that fire only while this skill is active.

providerExtensions.name: Path-Based Activation Filter
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter paths globs limit auto-activation to file matches; explicit /skill-name invocation is unrestricted.

providerExtensions.name: Per-Skill Shell Selection
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter shell selects bash (default) or powershell for inline command execution blocks within the skill.

providerExtensions.name: Argument and Session Variable Substitution
providerExtensions.summary: Skills support $ARGUMENTS, $N, ${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}, and ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR} string substitutions in skill body content.

providerExtensions.name: Shell Command Injection for Dynamic Context
providerExtensions.summary: Inline !`command` and ```! fenced blocks execute shell commands and inject output before Claude sees the prompt.

providerExtensions.name: Skill Content Lifecycle and Compaction Behavior
providerExtensions.summary: Skill content enters context once per invocation and is partially re-attached after auto-compaction within a 25,000-token combined budget.

providerExtensions.name: Nested Directory Auto-Discovery
providerExtensions.summary: Claude Code automatically discovers skills from .claude/skills/ directories along the path to edited files (monorepo support).

providerExtensions.name: Additional Directory Skills Loading with Live Reload
providerExtensions.summary: Skills in --add-dir directories are loaded with live change detection (other .claude/ configuration is not loaded from added directories).

providerExtensions.name: Plugin Scope
providerExtensions.summary: Plugin-bundled skills use a plugin-name:skill-name namespace separate from enterprise/personal/project priority ordering.

providerExtensions.name: Skill Permission Rules
providerExtensions.summary: Skill, Skill(name), and Skill(name *) permission rules restrict which skills Claude may invoke programmatically.

providerExtensions.name: Organization Policy to Disable Shell Execution in Skills
providerExtensions.summary: Managed setting disableSkillShellExecution disables inline shell command injection for user/project/plugin/added-directory skills.

providerExtensions.name: Bundled Skills
providerExtensions.summary: Claude Code ships built-in prompt-based skills (/simplify, /batch, /debug, /loop, /claude-api) immune to the shell-execution policy.

providerExtensions.name: Skill Description Context Budget
providerExtensions.summary: Skill descriptions share a dynamic budget (1% of context, 8,000 char fallback) with a 250-char per-entry cap, raisable via SLASH_COMMAND_TOOL_CHAR_BUDGET.

providerExtensions.name: Agent Skills Open Standard Compliance
providerExtensions.summary: Claude Code skills follow the Agent Skills open standard (agentskills.io) with CC-specific extensions layered on top.
